text: Stepping into this modern, glass-enclosed space, I feel a quiet sense of anticipation. The clean lines, the soft light, and the reflective surfaces suggest both order and the unknown—an invitation to explore. Moving closer to the vibrant R+D exhibit, I am drawn to its message of innovation and the evolving relationship between humans and machines. There is a sense of excitement here, a celebration of creativity and possibility. I feel small but hopeful, a participant in this unfolding story of progress and curiosity.
